title: Smoky Norwegian Pork Skewers
description: Grilled pork skewers with a smoky Norwegian twist, perfect for a summer evening. This recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, brown sugar, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Add the sliced pork to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the pork onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the pork is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot with a squeeze of lime juice and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
